name: Goji Kitchen
tagline: Chinese and Vietnamese favorites in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Goji Kitchen in Santa Rosa brings Chinese classics and Vietnamese favorites together near the Junior College — no MSG, with a wide range of vegetarian

sections.heading: Two Culinary Worlds, One Kitchen
sections.subheading: Chinese classics and Vietnamese favorites on one menu near the Junior College — no MSG, plenty of vegetarian and vegan.
badges: Chinese and Vietnamese under one roof
No MSG; many vegetarian & vegan dishes

sections.heading: About Goji Kitchen
body: On Mendocino Avenue near the Junior College, Goji Kitchen brings together the culinary traditions of China and Vietnam under one roof. The menu runs from bold stir-fries like Kung Pao Chicken and Szechuan Beef to soul-soothing bowls of Pho and Bun — made with premium ingredients and time-honored recipes, and no MSG.

Goji is built around care as much as cooking: a welcoming room, attentive service, and a deep bench of vegetarian and vegan options so everyone at the table is looked after. Signature dishes like the Roll-It-Yourself Grilled Shrimp on Sugar Cane keep regulars coming back.
highlights: Chinese and Vietnamese under one roof
No MSG; many vegetarian & vegan dishes

items.title: Chinese Classics
items.description: Kung Pao Chicken, Szechuan Beef, and the sweet-and-savory stir-fries of traditional Chinese cooking.

items.title: Vietnamese Favorites
items.description: Pho, Bun, and fresh rolls — the delicate, herb-forward flavors of Vietnam.

items.title: Signature Specialties
items.description: House favorites like Roll-It-Yourself Grilled Shrimp Paste on Sugar Cane and the Goji Sampler Rolls.

items.title: Vegetarian & Vegan
items.description: A wide selection of plant-based dishes — cooked without MSG or microwaves.

items.title: Takeout & Catering
items.description: Order ahead for pickup or let Goji cater your next gathering.

items.quote: --> --> --> --> --> --> --> --> --> Great mix of chinese and vietnamese food! Would definitely return.😃

--> --> --> --> Testimonials --> --> --> --> --> --> GOJI Kitchen - North Bay Bohemian --> I eat meat like a ravenous lion in the jungle, but one thing I can't stand is restaurants that don't have squat for my vegetarian and vegan friends

--> --> Goji Kitchen Offers Two Worlds of Cooking - Press Democrat --> Are you in the mood for the satisfying stir-fries and sweet and sour meats of Chinese cooking, or would you prefer the delicate green flavors of soups and fresh rolls of Vietnam
